detail.description:
(((The Best Cooperative Tower Defense in the world)))
Now recruiting players!

Do you believe 1+1 is better than 1? 😀
Want to achieve something awesome through teamwork? 😀

[What you need]
Cooperation ❤️ Loyalty ❤️ Friendship ❤️

This is a strategic tower defense game where cooperation is key!
We call it ⭐Coop TD⭐

Looking for an easy, fun co-op tower defense game?
Survival and defense combined!
Experience the joy of cooperation, the thrill of strategic choices, and the satisfaction of victory
detail.recentChanges:
Stop the Humans! Join [Co-op TD] Now!
■ Control the Battlefield! New Difficulty「Deep Sea」Update!
■ New AoE DPS 'Ivy' Is Here!
■ 'Giant Invasion' & 'Research Lab' added!
■ Season Pass Update! New Legendary Skin & Rewards!

eventMentions.text: it's very fun and addicting, just sucks your clears with friends don't really count towards new leve
very focused on making money, the community is full of p2w and is very toxic if you speak your mind
i'm stuck in the loading screen, it only stopped at 20%, must be because of the recent update edit:
since the update the game doesn't start anymore. just a black screen
very good for people who are new to the game and it actually fully teaches you and is not hard or to
